scripts.dev: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const env = { ...process.env, NODE_ENV: 'development' }; const pnpmCmd = process.platform === 'win32' ? 'pnpm.cmd' : 'pnpm'; const build = spawnSync(pnpmCmd, ['run', 'build'], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true, env }); if (build.status !== 0) process.exit(build.status ?? 1); const start = spawnSync('node', ['--enable-source-maps', './dist/index.mjs'], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true, env }); process.exit(start.status ?? 1);"
